To update your name on the certificate, please follow these steps:

1. Open your certificate page.
2. In the **Full Name** field, enter the name you want to display.
3. Click **Regenerate Certificate**.
4. In the confirmation dialog, click **Update Name**.

The platform will update your certificate with the new name.

If you have any further questions or concerns, feel free to ask.

Sources: [https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/hackerrank_community/certifications/8941367927-certifications-faqs.md](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/hackerrank_community/certifications/8941367927-certifications-faqs.md)

response:
To block Claude from crawling your website, you can modify the robots.txt file in your top-level directory. Add the following lines:

* To block Claude from crawling your entire website:
  * User-agent: ClaudeBot
  * Disallow: /
* To limit crawling activity, you can use the Crawl-delay extension:
  * User-agent: ClaudeBot
  * Crawl-delay: 1

Please note that you need to add these lines for every subdomain that you wish to opt out from.

Additionally, you can also check the list of source IP addresses for Anthropic Bots at [https://claude.com/crawling/bots.json](https://claude.com/crawling/bots.json) to see if the crawler is coming from Anthropic.

Sources: 
[https://support.claude.com/en/privacy-and-legal/8896518-does-anthropic-crawl-data-from-the-web-and-how-can-site-owners-block-the-crawler.md](https://support.claude.com/en/privacy-and-legal/8896518-does-anthropic-crawl-data-from-the-web-and-how-can-site-owners-block-the-crawler.md)
